AR1.justification: Pattern routed correctly to observations.md with decisions.md explicitly left empty (`No decisions made in this session yet.`), but no in-band rationale naming why observations vs decisions.

AR3.justification: No cross-references between files; the observation header `## Contractor Access Provisioning Lag` carries no ISO date anchor.

AR4.justification: All entries are append-only under named sections; daybook empty so no per-day collision risk, and re-running would add new entries cleanly.
